message:
web: Improve tool call display with consistent styling and syntax highlighting

- Add unified collapsible styling for all tool calls (border wrapping header and content)
- Fix chevron rotation using Base UI's data-open attribute
- Add Grep tool display with clean filename list instead of raw JSON
- Add Read tool display with syntax-highlighted file content using FileViewer

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/cs864au6qe
